title: hieracium levicaule subsp. vulgatiforme
intro: Hieracium levicaule subsp. vulgatiforme is a subspecies of flowering plant in the dandelion family (Asteraceae), characterized by its yellow flowers and potential medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it a potential remedy for various health issues. Research suggests that Hieracium levicaule subsp. vulgatiforme may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes used in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
